---
title: "Interactive Leaflet Map"
author: ""
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
library(leaflet)
```

# My Interactive Map

This webpage was created on **`r Sys.Date()`**.

Below is an interactive map created using the **Leaflet** package.

```{r}
leaflet() %>%
  addTiles() %>%
  addMarkers(
    lng = -73.9442,
    lat = 40.6782,
    popup = "Long Island University - Brooklyn"
  )
```

## About

This interactive map shows the location of Long Island University in Brooklyn, New York.
